channel.title: techniques on Xing Lin
channel.description: Recent content in techniques on Xing Lin

item.title: Enduring Ideas/Techniques that are used today
item.description: There are a few ideas/techniques that were invented a long time ago but they are being used/re-implemented again and again, even in today’s sytems. Why do people look and reimplement these techniques, even after 50 years? Because, even after 50 years, we face largely the same problem when we design new systems. Here are a few examples. Ideas First-time Introduced What problem is solved? Trasactions Make it easy to develop on top of a data store.
